abort.entry_not_loaded: The main integration entry is not loaded. Please ensure the integration is loaded before reconfiguring.

data_description.reasoning_effort: How hard reasoning models think before answering. 'Model default' leaves it unset; 'None' disables reasoning.
data_description.show_reasoning: Stream the model's chain of thought to the chat UI (reasoning models only). Off by default — it can make the Assist chat stall on tool-using turns. The model still reasons either way.

data_description.llm_hass_api: Select which tools the model can use to interact with your devices and entities.
data_description.model: The model to use for the conversation agent
data_description.prompt: Instruct how the LLM should respond. This can be a template.
data_description.reasoning_effort: How hard reasoning models think before answering. 'Model default' leaves it unset; 'None' disables reasoning.
data_description.show_reasoning: Stream the model's chain of thought to the chat UI (reasoning models only). Off by default — it can make the Assist chat stall on tool-using turns. The model still reasons either way.
